title: Conis Explains the Sky World
description: The Straw Hats enter Skypiea through Heaven’s Gate and meet the strange rules and tolls of the sky world.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Nami, Luffy, Gan Fall, Usopp, Conis. The Straw Hats enter Skypiea through Heaven’s Gate and meet the strange rules and tolls of the sky world.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So now we're back to square one.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Okay, let's call mister and ask him.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Anyways, let's just get the ship moving.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: ...then what kind of cloud is it...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We'll know if we touch it, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It feels better than a thousand Futons*.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What is it, what is it?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yeah! Under that waterfall- looking cloud

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's just call that armored Mister.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: We seem to have passed through.

summary: The Straw Hats enter Skypiea through Heaven’s Gate and meet the strange rules and tolls of the sky world.
